global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear call to action and user-generated content elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to join and play with friends.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, creating a lively atmosphere.

elements.label: User-generated content icon
elements.description: A small circular icon representing user-generated content, placed centrally in the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon representing user-generated content, positioned next to the first icon.

elements.label: Content grid
elements.description: A grid of four empty circles, suggesting a space for user-generated content, located at the top center.

elements.label: Content grid
elements.description: Another grid of four empty circles, mirroring the previous element, positioned beside it.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small element at the top, possibly decorative, with no clear visual identity.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another small element at the top, similar to the previous one, lacking a distinct visual purpose.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small element in the center, possibly decorative, with no clear visual identity.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another small element in the center, similar to the previous one, lacking a distinct visual purpose.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, prominent text stating 'Join the arena Play with friends tonight', centrally positioned for emphasis.
elements.text_content: Join the arena Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'PixelForge' displayed at the top left, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Start now', designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: User-generated content label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC', positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, main headline and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, with icons and logos at the top, and the CTA at the bottom.
